home.title: ErasmusLinks | Premium European Mobility Partner Network
home.description: Integrating fragmented local providers into complete mobility solutions for schools, VET, and NGOs across Europe.

offer.title: Official Mobility Proposal | ErasmusLinks
offer.description: Personalized Erasmus+ mobility and integration proposal for St. Mary's Vocational School — Barcelona Hub, Spain.

hero.subtitle: Connecting schools, VET centres, and municipalities with vetted European hosts, premium course providers, and end-to-end mobility logistics—delivered with institutional precision and full Erasmus+ compliance.

pillars.subtitle: A three-pillar framework that unifies schools, host partners, and the wider ecosystem under one premium operational standard.

items.title: Single Point of Contact
items.description: From curated course calendars to host matching and evidence packs. We eliminate administrative friction so your team can focus on learners—not logistics.

items.title: Standardized Packaging
items.description: Connecting European hosts with verified international groups, handling logistics, sales, and quality frameworks so every partnership scales with confidence.

items.title: The Mobility Integrator
items.description: Blending job shadowing, structural sector visits, and practical training into a trusted network that delivers coherent outcomes across borders.

coreServices.subtitle: Premium mobility services engineered for institutions with EU funding commitments and zero tolerance for operational risk.

items.title: Managed Mobility
items.description: Direct end-to-end premium packaging through vetted sub-contractors. One contract, one coordinator, complete accountability from arrival to departure.

items.title: Course Calendar
items.description: Public fixed dates, small international groups, and guaranteed delivery. Browse ready-made programmes designed for schools and VET centres with EU funding.

items.title: Job Shadowing Desk
items.description: Premium niche targeting sector visits, professional mentors, and precise learning outcomes. Structured placements aligned to curriculum and competence frameworks.

items.title: Quality Framework
items.description: Strict compliance matrices, standardized communication, and ready-to-audit documentation packs. Every mobility engineered for Erasmus+ scrutiny.

destinations.subtitle: Our initial partner network spans seven strategic destinations—each with vetted hosts, course providers, and on-ground coordination teams ready to activate your mobility programme.

evidencePack.paragraph1: Every ErasmusLinks mobility is built to Erasmus+ Quality Standards from day one. We do not treat documentation as an afterthought—it is embedded into programme design, delivery, and close-out.
evidencePack.paragraph2: Each mobility arrives with a structured verification bundle that protects your institution against grant rejection risk. From certificates to auditable invoices, your national agency receives exactly what it expects—nothing missing, nothing ambiguous.

items.title: Completion Certificates
items.detail: Official certificates issued per participant, aligned to programme learning outcomes and institutional branding requirements.

items.title: Europass Mobility Documents
items.detail: Structured Europass records capturing skills acquired, host organisation details, and mobility duration for transparent credential recognition.

items.title: Attendance & Activity Proofs
items.detail: Timestamped attendance registers, session logs, and photographic evidence packs that satisfy national agency verification protocols.

items.title: Auditable Financial Records
items.detail: Itemised invoices, budget reconciliation sheets, and grant-aligned cost breakdowns designed to eliminate rejection risk at audit stage.

leadForm.subtitle: Tell us about your organisation and mobility objectives. Our team will architect a bespoke programme blueprint aligned to your EU funding framework and institutional requirements.

productPreview.sectionTitle: The Future of Erasmus+ Mobility Management
productPreview.sectionSubtitle: A next-generation SaaS ecosystem built to digitalize and scale European projects
productPreview.tab1_title: Discover your next destination in seconds
productPreview.tab1_desc: An interactive European map combined with advanced filtering options across educational sectors (School Education, VET, Adult Education). It allows approved schools and coordinators to pinpoint and plan their ideal mobility hub instantly. (References: 2.png, 3.jpg, 4.jpg)
productPreview.tab2_desc: Zero guesswork. Gain instant visibility into complete day-by-day 7-day timelines, intense training modules, certified hosting partner profiles, and a full breakdown of embedded logistics packages including premium accommodation, airport transfers, and cultural integration events. (References: 5.jpg, 6.jpg)
productPreview.tab3_title: An elite ecosystem for schools and consortia
productPreview.tab3_desc: A dedicated, shared workspace tailored for receiving partners, consortia, and VET institutions. It streamlines bilateral agreement workflows, tracks real-time group allocations, and perfectly aligns hosting capacity with sending requirements across Europe. (References: 1.png, 7.png)
productPreview.tab4_desc: Eliminate chaotic spreadsheets and compliance friction. Our smart inquiry generator operates strictly within official Erasmus+ financial funding frameworks and grant rules. Input your group size, dates, and hub destination – the system builds the proposal automatically. (References: 8.png, 9.png)

footer.copyright: ErasmusLinks. Premium European Mobility Partner Network.
footer.tagline: Erasmus+ Quality Standards · EU Funding Ready

actionBar.acceptAlert: Proposal accepted. Our mobility coordination team will contact you within 24 hours to finalize contractual details.

header.title: Official Mobility & Integration Proposal
header.subtitle: Erasmus+ Key Action 1: Learning Mobility of Individuals

blueprint.subtitle: A structured 7-day mobility programme designed for maximum pedagogical impact, operational reliability, and full Erasmus+ compliance from arrival to departure.

timeline.title: Arrival & Seamless Airport Transfer to Partner Hotel
timeline.description: Dedicated meet-and-greet at Barcelona-El Prat Airport. Private group transfer to our vetted partner hotel in the city centre. Evening welcome briefing covering programme schedule, safety protocols, and local orientation materials.

timeline.title: Structural Visit & Institutional Onboarding at Sector Labs
timeline.description: Guided institutional visit to partner VET sector laboratories. Introduction to local pedagogical frameworks, competence mapping sessions, and bilateral alignment workshops with host institution leadership.

timeline.title: Intensive Training Modules (Advanced Pedagogical Frameworks)
timeline.description: Three full days of structured professional development: dual-learning methodology workshops, digital skills integration labs, assessment design clinics, and peer observation cycles with certified host trainers.

timeline.title: Cultural Immersion Program & Networking Dinner
timeline.description: Curated cultural programme connecting professional learning with local heritage. Guided sector networking dinner with European mobility stakeholders, host educators, and regional VET policy representatives.

timeline.title: Certificate Award Ceremony, Final Compliance Package Sign-off & Departure
timeline.description: Official certificate award ceremony with Europass documentation handover. Final evidence pack review and sign-off. Coordinated group transfer to airport with complete auditable documentation bundle delivered digitally.

evidence.subtitle: ErasmusLinks guarantees full Erasmus+ compliance by delivering a complete verification bundle with every mobility. This proposal includes comprehensive audit protection—ensuring your institution faces zero documentation risk at national agency review.

items.title: Original Auditable Invoices
items.description: Itemised, grant-aligned financial documentation with VAT breakdowns, supplier verification, and budget reconciliation sheets ready for national agency audit.

items.title: Europass Mobility Records
items.description: Individual Europass Mobility Documents for all 12 participants, capturing learning outcomes, host organisation credentials, and mobility duration.

items.title: Official Learning Agreements
items.description: Pre-mobility and post-mobility learning agreements signed by sending institution, host organisation, and participants—fully aligned to Erasmus+ requirements.

items.title: Verifiable Attendance Logs
items.description: Timestamped daily attendance registers, session activity logs, and photographic evidence packs satisfying verification protocols for grant final reporting.

pricing.subtitle: Transparent, grant-aligned pricing for a fully managed 7-day mobility programme. All costs are structured for Erasmus+ budget categories and national agency reporting requirements.

rows.description: Professional development modules, host institution access, certified trainers, and learning materials
7-night partner hotel accommodation, airport transfers, daily local transport, on-ground coordinator, and cultural programme
Evidence pack assembly, Europass processing, learning agreement coordination, and audit-ready documentation

pricing.fundingNote: 100% Eligible for Erasmus+ Grant Funding Cover.
